---
title: "Using features of dynamic networks to guide treatment selection and outcome prediction: The central role of uncertainty"
author: "Björn Siepe"
date: "2026-05-26"
categories: [Time Series, EMA, Network Analysis]
image: "bmlvar_screenshot.png"
engine: knitr
comments: false
execute:
  freeze: true
description: "Talk at the APS Annual Convention (2026), Barcelona, Spain"
license: "CC BY"
cv:
  pdf1: "APS-Centrality-Talk-Siepe-2026.pdf"
---

See [here](https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/2c8xf_v2) for the preprint.

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 100%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}
.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 80%;
    height: 80%;
}
```

Find the slides here:

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf4`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download PDF Slides
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf1`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
